top_signals.title: Massive bonuses for South Korea's chip workers puts central bank on inflation alert
top_signals.summary: Workers from tech industries receive bonus worth millions of won, prompting the Bank of Korea to warn of the upward pressure to inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India plays ‘whack-a-mole’ with online financial influencers
top_signals.summary: Regulator targets scammers who give stock tips under guise of financial education as ranks of retail investors grow
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: King Charles to publish tax bill for ‘transparency’
top_signals.summary: The King is to become the first head of state to reveal their personal tax bill to help enhance transparency around royal finances. Charles will publish his financial details as his royal household seeks to increase “clarity and accessibility” around the monarchy’s finances by producing a new report on the subject.
